mapper.sql: fm.id, fm.name, fm.component, fm.pid, fm.sort, fm.icon, fm.path, fm.component_name, fm.permission, fm.type, fm.create_time, fm.create_by, fm.update_time, fm.update_by, fm.i_frame_flag, fm.cache_flag, fm.hidden_flag, fm.blank_flag, fm.send_token_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.component as ${tAlias}_component, ${tAlias}.pid as ${tAlias}_pid, ${tAlias}.sort as ${tAlias}_sort, ${tAlias}.icon as ${tAlias}_icon, ${tAlias}.path as ${tAlias}_path, ${tAlias}.component_name as ${tAlias}_component_name, ${tAlias}.permission as ${tAlias}_permission, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.i_frame_flag as ${tAlias}_i_frame_flag, ${tAlias}.cache_flag as ${tAlias}_cache_flag, ${tAlias}.hidden_flag as ${tAlias}_hidden_flag, ${tAlias}.blank_flag as ${tAlias}_blank_flag, ${tAlias}.send_token_flag as ${tAlias}_send_token_flag
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_menu (name, component, pid, sort, icon, path, component_name, permission, type, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, i_frame_flag, cache_flag, hidden_flag, blank_flag, send_token_flag) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{component,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sort,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{componentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{permission,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{iFrameFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{cacheFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{hiddenFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{blankFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{sendTokenFlag,jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update: update fnd_menu set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, component = #{component,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pid = #{pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=BIGINT}, icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, path = #{path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, component_name = #{componentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, permission = #{permission,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, i_frame_flag = #{iFrameFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, cache_flag = #{cacheFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, hidden_flag = #{hiddenFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, blank_flag = #{blankFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, send_token_flag = #{sendTokenFlag,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: where fm.pid = #{pid,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by fm.sort asc

select
from fnd_menu fm left outer join fnd_roles_menus frm on fm.id = frm.menu_id left outer join fnd_role fr on frm.role_id = fr.id where fr.id = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
and (fm.type not in (#{typeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}))
order by fm.sort asc

select
from fnd_menu fm left outer join fnd_roles_menus frm on fm.id = frm.menu_id left outer join fnd_role fr on frm.role_id = fr.id where 1 = 1
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
and 1 = 0
and (fm.type not in (#{typeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}))
order by fm.type,fm.sort asc
